title: CNC Laser Machine Operator
description: Expert in operating fiber laser cutting machines. Must understand DXF files and material parameters.
requirements: 2+ years experience with CNC Laser machines

title: Mechanical Engineer (Machine Design)
description: Design and optimize rice processing machinery using SolidWorks and CAD tools.

title: Sales Engineer (Industrial)
description: Consultative sales for rice mill owners. Provide technical solutions and machinery quotes.
requirements: Willingness to travel to mill sites

title: Fabrication Supervisor
description: Oversee the welding and fabrication shop. Ensure parts meet quality standards.

title: Summer Internship 2026
description: A 3-month program for engineering students to learn real-world manufacturing.
requirements: Enrolled in 3rd or 4th year of Engineering degree

title: Industrial Draftsman
description: Create detailed technical drawings and 2D layouts for machine components and factory layouts. Bridge the gap between engineering concepts and production.
requirements: Ability to convert 3D models into production-ready 2D drawings
Experience with sheet metal flat patterns for CNC laser cutting
Diploma in Mechanical Drafting or equivalent
